title: Streaming Analysis, Chunk Boundaries, and Resource Budgets
description: A large-file mode still calls read_text, splits tokens at chunk edges, decodes partial UTF-8 incorrectly, retains every token, and claims bounded memory without measurement. Learners cumulatively produce bounded streaming analyzer through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Process lines or bounded chunks incrementally and keep only state required by the declared report.
Carry a bounded token fragment across chunk boundaries and prove concatenated-chunk equivalence.
Use an incremental decoder or text stream that preserves multibyte sequences and explicit error policy.
